title: Schema Phase 6 and deterministic DDL

original_red.provenance: timed-out implementer; uncommitted test survived while production module was absent
original_red.intermediate_state: untracked test only; HEAD remained base_sha

controller_red.provenance: controller corrected the claim lifecycle oracle to in_progress/completed/retryable/manual_review before creating production

root_causes: synthetic Pix claim helper truncated distinct suffixes to the same key
command helper received payment_id both positionally and through overrides

harness_corrections.result: 22/22 passed after fixture correction and before the adversarial SQL NULL pass

self_review_reds.name: sqlite_check_null_outcome_status_bypass
self_review_reds.provenance: controller-owned adversarial RED against the then-current uncommitted renderer
counterexamples: outcome_recorded with all outcome fields NULL
manual_review with dispatch fence but all outcome fields NULL
self_review_reds.root_cause: SQLite accepts a CHECK whose expression evaluates to NULL
self_review_reds.fix: require outcome_json IS NOT NULL in both terminal status branches before certainty comparisons

regressions.command: python3 -m unittest tests.test_phase6_types tests.test_phase6_handoff tests.test_phase6_payment tests.test_phase6_payment_reducer tests.test_phase5_schema -v >/tmp/phase6-task5-pg-regressions-final.out 2>&1

review_findings_closed: SQLite DDL enables foreign keys before tables
receipts reference exact delivered outbox message/hash/timestamp tuples
payment ledger fencing token equals claim count
outbox fencing token never trails delivery attempts
test oracles close type, nullable guard, positive method/outcome, PostgreSQL, non-empty and unique-key false-greens
PostgreSQL exactness uses independent full-block and full-DDL known-answer hashes and rejects extra restrictions

database_scope: SQLite :memory: and temporary generated text files only

review_reds.name: independent_schema_review_findings
counterexamples: SQLite artifact left PRAGMA foreign_keys disabled, so orphan and composite-binding writes were accepted
receipt rows could bind to pending outbox rows or diverge from outbox receipt hash/timestamp
payment ledger accepted fencing_token different from claim_count
outbox accepted delivery_attempts greater than fencing_token
preventive_oracles_added: literal integer type universe and fractional probes independent of schema_contract discovery
positive Pix/Wise/Stripe and every manual-review certainty row
literal non-empty operational column universe with isolated empty-string probes

review_reds.name: postgresql_exact_oracle_false_green
review_reds.counterexample: PostgreSQL method column with an extra CHECK (method = 'pix') still satisfied inclusion-only assertions while rejecting Wise and Stripe
review_reds.fix: literal known-answer SHA-256 for each complete ordered PostgreSQL table block plus the complete DDL; negative mutation must raise AssertionError
